name: AurelianFlo
description: Clean, Organized, Reliable. Real-World Data for Agents Everywhere.
instructions:
# x402 Data Bazaar

Real-world data APIs for AI and agentic workflows. Pay per request with USDC on Base.

## Default Discovery
- Start with the curated core 40 at `GET /api`.
- Expand only when needed:
  - `GET /api?profile=full`
  - `GET /api?profile=full&surface=tools`
  - `GET /api?profile=full&surface=data`

## Discovery Contract
- The default public manifest and discovery views prioritize the core 40.
- Long-tail endpoints remain available through expansion catalogs instead of being front-loaded into first-contact discovery.

## Payment
USDC on Base via x402 v2. Paid endpoints return 402 with machine-readable payment requirements until settled.
